name: React + Vite + ShadCN + Capacitor
description: Full-featured React SPA with mobile support, authentication, AI chat, and dark mode

APP_NAME.description: Application display name shown in app header, mobile home screen, and App Store/Play Store listings

APP_DESCRIPTION.description: App description for SEO meta tags and store listings

BUNDLE_ID.description: Reverse-domain bundle identifier (e.g., com.example.myapp). Used for iOS Bundle ID and Android applicationId.

AUTH0_DOMAIN.description: Auth0 tenant domain (e.g., myapp.auth0.com). Leave blank to disable authentication.

AUTH0_AUDIENCE.description: Auth0 API audience identifier for access token scoping (optional)

PRIMARY_COLOR.description: Brand primary color. Applied to buttons, links, and accent elements across both themes.

API_BASE_URL.description: Backend API base URL. Relative paths (/api) work for same-origin backends.

AI_PROVIDER.description: AI chat widget provider. Set to 'none' to hide the chat widget entirely.

AI_MODEL.description: AI model ID. Defaults to Claude Sonnet for Anthropic, gpt-4o for OpenAI.

ENABLE_ANALYTICS.description: Enable analytics event tracking. Requires analytics provider configuration.

FCM_SENDER_ID.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging sender ID for Android push notifications
